title: Vieunite Textura Digital Canvas Device Report
summary: Easy-to-deploy digital canvas range with strong visual quality and a framed artwork aesthetic. Best suited to simple signage or decorative use where Wi-Fi, cloud management and licensing requirements are acceptable.

title: Lindy 4-Port iPower Switch Device Report
summary: Compact network-controlled PDU with remote outlet control, energy monitoring and broad protocol support. Main concerns are exposed physical controls and less straightforward network identification during commissioning.

title: Yealink S40 + MTower Bench Test
summary: The S40 and MTower performed well for audio quality, camera quality, and ease of deployment. Main limitations were inconsistent camera switching, limited MTower image tuning, and overly sensitive tracking modes.

title: Sennheiser TeamConnect Bar Bench Test
summary: The TC Bar M delivered excellent speaker quality, strong Dante integration, and fast deployment. Camera performance was average and best suited to rooms within 3-4 metres, limiting suitability for larger spaces.

title: Plexus AVN-4 & AVN-VA Bench Test
summary: The Plexus AVN series showed fast switching, flexible I/O, Dante integration, and an intuitive web GUI. Key concerns were USB 2.0 limitations, heat output, exposed SFP ports, and inconsistent switching when EDIDs/resolutions were not fixed.

title: Ochno + Lightware Integration Video-Only Bench Test
productCategory: AV Switching, Video Distribution, USB-C Connectivity
summary: Bench testing was carried out to assess Ochno and Lightware integration in video-only mode after USB functionality was removed from the signal path. Removing USB improved switching consistency and eliminated the random delays seen in previous testing. However, video switching still took between 7 and 12 seconds depending on source and scenario. Enabling the Lightware Welcome Screen reduced switching time by approximately 3 seconds by maintaining the displays 5V state, but the remaining delay appears to be inherent to the Ochno hardware's switching and EDID negotiation process.

title: Lightware UCX-1x1-C40
summary: Bench test to find and test limitations and discover features.

title: Ochno O-PC-4
summary: Testing the new Ochno O-PC-4 to find its key features and limitations.
